subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Render praise unto God, for the gathering of teaching hath been adorned, and souls unto the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان حمد کن خدا را که انجمن تبلیغ تزیین یافته و نفوسی بملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @knowledge; recognition of God
